violations.description: Backflow prevention. — --Direct connection existed between the sewage system and drain originating from equipment in which food, portable equipment/utensils are placed. -No air gap on food prep sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles removed exposing the attic in the back food prep/dish washing area.

Handling of clean equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not handled in a manner to prevent contamination of food-contact surface. -Single serve utensils are laying different directions in the box used to hand out to customers.

Backflow prevention. — --Direct connection existed between the sewage system and drain originating from equipment in which food, portable equipment/utensils are placed. -No air gap on the food prep sink.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
